services.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH EMS Onetech Group / Electronics Manufacturing Services / Smart, Scalable & High-Quality Electronic Production In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries. Through our specialized subsidiary Eleonetech , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Integrated Module Manufacturing In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries. Through our specialized subsidiary Eleonetech , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Our Services Hardware & Software Design (HW & SW) Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Assembly Wave Soldering (Leaded and Lead-Free) under Nitrogen Manual Insertion and Assembly Potting and Selective Conformal Coating Laser Marking and Depaneling In-Circuit Testing (ICT) and Functional Testing (FCT) X-Ray Inspection Box Build and Final System Assembly Product Traceability & Factory-Wide Track and Trace System From Design to Mass Production At Eleonetech, we are involved at every stage Design & Development (CAD, prototyping, standards compliance) Industrialization & Manufacturing Optimization Testing Solutions Development (Flying Probe, ICT, FCT) Reverse Engineering and Obsolescence Management Supply Chain Optimization and Material Management Our engineers collaborate closely with clients’ R&D teams to ensure smooth transitions from product concept to industrial production. Advanced Capabilities PCBAs on FR4, IMS, and Flex PCBs Component placement accuracy: 30–50µm Full traceability at each production step In-line AOI (2D & 3D) and SPI inspection SMT packages, exotic components, and LED binning management FIFO buffer systems for oven output management Specialized processes for BGA components and high-reliability applications Certifications & Awards Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Télécharger Awarded Best Quality Supplier (Valeo 2016) Valeo Logistics Award (Valeo 2017) Italian Business Oscars (Italian Business Oscars) Kaizen Tunisia Prize (Best Kaizen Company in Africa) Best Quality Supplier (Valeo 2016) Valeo Logistics Award (Valeo 2017) Italian Business Oscars (Italian Business Oscars) Kaizen Tunisia Prize (Best Kaizen Company in Africa) Best Quality Supplier (Valeo 2016) Valeo Logistics Award (Valeo 2017) Italian Business Oscars (Italian Business Oscars) Kaizen Tunisia Prize (Best Kaizen Company in Africa) Quality, Environment, Health and Safety Policy Download QSE document Partners Let's Shape the Future Together Connect with our EMS Experts Contact us Get in Touch ##### Subscribe to our newsletter to stay in touch with the latest Email Send OneTech Group is committed to building a more responsible industry, combining technological innovation, sustainable performance, and respect for the environment. paragraphs: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH **EMS** Onetech Group / Electronics Manufacturing Services / Smart, Scalable & High-Quality Electronic Production

**In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries.** Through our specialized subsidiary **Eleonetech** , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in **automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy** to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Integrated Module Manufacturing **In a world powered by electronics, turning innovative ideas into reliable, high-performance products requires precision, speed, and scalability. At OneTech, we bridge the gap between concept and market with end-to-end Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) tailored to the most demanding industries.** Through our specialized subsidiary **Eleonetech** , and backed by almost 30 years of experience, we provide full-lifecycle EMS solutions that meet the highest international standards; from design and prototyping to industrialization, mass production, and end-of-life support. With deep engineering expertise and robust quality systems, we empower leading brands in **automotive, industrial, telecom, and smart energy** to bring their innovations to life faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Our Services * Hardware & Software Design (HW & SW) * Surface Mount Technology (SMT) Assembly * Wave Soldering (Leaded and Lead-Free) under Nitrogen * Manual Insertion and Assembly * Potting and Selective Conformal Coating * Laser Marking and Depaneling * In-Circuit Testing (ICT) and Functional Testing (FCT) * X-Ray Inspection * Box Build and Final System Assembly * Product Traceability & Factory-Wide Track and Trace System

From Design to Mass Production **At Eleonetech, we are involved at every stage** * Design & Development (CAD, prototyping, standards compliance) * Industrialization & Manufacturing Optimization * Testing Solutions Development (Flying Probe, ICT, FCT) * Reverse Engineering and Obsolescence Management * Supply Chain Optimization and Material Management

Our engineers collaborate closely with clients’ R&D teams to ensure smooth transitions from product concept to industrial production. Advanced Capabilities * PCBAs on **FR4, IMS, and Flex PCBs** * Component placement accuracy: 30–50µm * Full traceability at each production step * In-line AOI (2D & 3D) and SPI inspection * SMT packages, exotic components, and LED binning management * FIFO buffer systems for oven output management * Specialized processes for BGA components and high-reliability applications

technology.clean_text: Aller au contenu Linkedin-in Youtube Facebook-f ENGLISH Design & Development Onetech Group / Design & Development / A cross-functional innovation hub At the core of our mechatronics cluster, the newly established Design & Product Development Division (R&D) reflects our Group’s commitment to delivering smart, integrated electronic solutions tailored to the evolving needs of high-tech industries. From technical feasibility studies to full industrialization , we support our clients throughout the entire product development cycle. While initially focused on the automotive industry , our division also addresses a wide range of high-potential markets with increasing demand for embedded electronics and intelligent systems. Our mission is to transform complex ideas into reliable, scalable products , combining innovation with industrial expertise. Partnering with : Multidisciplinary Expertise for Smart & Integrated Solutions Our team brings together core competencies in the following areas Electronic Design / PCB / PCBA End-to-end design, manufacturing, and integration of electronic boards engineered for harsh environments and demanding applications. Embedded Software Design Custom firmware and software development tailored to industry standards, with a strong emphasis on quality, validation, and performance. Mechanical Design Product/process integration and co-design from the earliest development stages, ensuring technical constraints are addressed seamlessly. Wiring & Cable Design Development of customized harnesses and cable assemblies optimized for each unique application A Group-Wide Innovation Enabler Our division is designed to work in close collaboration with other business units and subsidiaries across the Mechatronics Cluster. positioning itself as a cross-functional innovation hub. We deliver modular, intelligent products and subsystems that meet diverse technical needs while accelerating time-to-market. Whether you’re seeking to develop a new electronic product, integrate embedded systems, or co-design with manufacturing in mind, our Design & Product Development Division is your trusted partner for turnkey solutions. Companies and subsidiaries across the Mechatronics Cluster Let's Shape the Future Together Connect with our Design & Development Experts Contact us Get in Touch ##### Subscribe to our newsletter to stay in touch with the latest Email Send OneTech Group is committed to building a more responsible industry, combining technological innovation, sustainable performance, and respect for the environment. We believe in progress that serves both people and the planet ##
